query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: Soft pink, green, yellow, and white color fields blend together in an out-of-focus image suggestive of blooming flowers and foliage in bright daylight.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely blurred photograph where all subjects dissolve into soft, indistinct color fields of pink, green, yellow, and white, with no discernible edges, textures, or recognizable forms remaining; the heavy intentional blur and complete absence of detail create a dreamy, atmospheric impression suggestive of unfocused flowers and foliage in bright light.
